description.ko: NEON-V를 통해 숨막히는 미래의 비전을 경험해 보세요. 이 테마는 비가 그치지 않고 잠들지 않는 도시의 분위기 속에서, 첨단 기술과 거친 네온 사인이 어우러진 사이버펑크 메갈로폴리스의 정수를 담아냈습니다.
description.en: Experience a breathtaking vision of the future with NEON-V. This theme captures the essence of a cyberpunk megalopolis, blending advanced technology with a gritty, neon-soaked atmosphere where the rain never stops and the city never sleeps.

prompt: A cinematic, wide-angle shot of a sprawling cyberpunk city at night. Towering skyscrapers are adorned with massive holographic advertisements and flickering neon signs in vibrant cyan, magenta, and electric violet. Low-hanging clouds and a light drizzle create a misty atmosphere, with wet asphalt streets reflecting the brilliant city lights. Flying vehicles weave through the vertical urban landscape, and a sense of high-tech grit permeates the scene. 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, synthwave aesthetic, volumetric lighting.
